name: Showa Paxxs Corporation
summary: Showa Paxxs Corporation manufactures and sells packaging containers and materials in Japan and internationally. It offers Kraft paper bags, such as flash pinch, double pinch, SES pinch, sunny easy pack, easy pack, Z hold, single and double bottom, echo, SCE, rice wheat, bax, and elpax bags, as well as bag in bags; medium sized bags for rice milling; polyethylene heavy bags; and Showa traceability systems. The company also provides containers for powder grains and liquids; and packaging machine equipment. Further, it leases real estate properties. The company was founded in 1935 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
